## Meeting Purpose

[Follow-up discussion between GrowthX and Notable Capital to explore potential Series B investment opportunity.](https://fathom.video/share/hn5GV8f5TTUaFPxxknx2c7o21Azcmmss?tab=summary&timestamp=1.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [GrowthX has grown rapidly since Series A, hitting $11M run rate and nearing profitability](https://fathom.video/share/hn5GV8f5TTUaFPxxknx2c7o21Azcmmss?tab=summary&timestamp=380.0)
  - [Company offers AI-powered content/marketing services with 70%+ margins, displacing traditional agencies](https://fathom.video/share/hn5GV8f5TTUaFPxxknx2c7o21Azcmmss?tab=summary&timestamp=393.0)
  - [Currently in active fundraising process for $40-60M Series B to accelerate growth](https://fathom.video/share/hn5GV8f5TTUaFPxxknx2c7o21Azcmmss?tab=summary&timestamp=401.0)
  - [Notable Capital expressed strong interest, will review materials and follow up promptly](https://fathom.video/share/hn5GV8f5TTUaFPxxknx2c7o21Azcmmss?tab=summary&timestamp=473.0)

## Topics

### GrowthX Business Model & Growth

  - [Raised Series A in March, now at $11M run rate with ARR close behind](https://fathom.video/share/hn5GV8f5TTUaFPxxknx2c7o21Azcmmss?tab=summary&timestamp=365.0)
  - [Services-first model delivering marketing/content outcomes, not just software](https://fathom.video/share/hn5GV8f5TTUaFPxxknx2c7o21Azcmmss?tab=summary&timestamp=620.0)
  - [100% conversion from 8-week paid sprint to ongoing engagement](https://fathom.video/share/hn5GV8f5TTUaFPxxknx2c7o21Azcmmss?tab=summary&timestamp=844.0)
  - [Win rate of 39% for initial sprints, $180k average deal size](https://fathom.video/share/hn5GV8f5TTUaFPxxknx2c7o21Azcmmss?tab=summary&timestamp=844.0)
  - [Largest deal: $720k closed in 4 days with Surge AI](https://fathom.video/share/hn5GV8f5TTUaFPxxknx2c7o21Azcmmss?tab=summary&timestamp=581.0)
  - [70 employees: \~30 on product/engineering, \~40 on service delivery](https://fathom.video/share/hn5GV8f5TTUaFPxxknx2c7o21Azcmmss?tab=summary&timestamp=1600.0)

### Technology Platform

  - [Internal AI platform powers content workflows and expert augmentation](https://fathom.video/share/hn5GV8f5TTUaFPxxknx2c7o21Azcmmss?tab=summary&timestamp=1134.0)
  - [Features include context-aware AI editing, knowledge graph, analytics](https://fathom.video/share/hn5GV8f5TTUaFPxxknx2c7o21Azcmmss?tab=summary&timestamp=1134.0)
  - [Workflows represented as code, enabling rapid iteration and scaling](https://fathom.video/share/hn5GV8f5TTUaFPxxknx2c7o21Azcmmss?tab=summary&timestamp=1149.0)
  - [Plan to expose more capabilities to customers over time](https://fathom.video/share/hn5GV8f5TTUaFPxxknx2c7o21Azcmmss?tab=summary&timestamp=1660.0)

### Market Opportunity

  - [$500B annual spend on marketing services](https://fathom.video/share/hn5GV8f5TTUaFPxxknx2c7o21Azcmmss?tab=summary&timestamp=701.0)
  - [32,000+ agencies and 300,000+ freelancers in US alone](https://fathom.video/share/hn5GV8f5TTUaFPxxknx2c7o21Azcmmss?tab=summary&timestamp=701.0)
  - [Displacing traditional agencies unable to compete on speed/quality](https://fathom.video/share/hn5GV8f5TTUaFPxxknx2c7o21Azcmmss?tab=summary&timestamp=1936.0)

### Fundraising Process

  - [Seeking $40-60M Series B to accelerate growth](https://fathom.video/share/hn5GV8f5TTUaFPxxknx2c7o21Azcmmss?tab=summary&timestamp=2340.0)
  - [In late stages with \~10 vetted investors, including partner meetings](https://fathom.video/share/hn5GV8f5TTUaFPxxknx2c7o21Azcmmss?tab=summary&timestamp=2407.0)
  - [Not urgently needed (low burn, near profitability) but sees big opportunity](https://fathom.video/share/hn5GV8f5TTUaFPxxknx2c7o21Azcmmss?tab=summary&timestamp=2399.0)

### Team & Hiring Plans

  - [Leadership from notable tech companies (Grammarly, Coinbase, etc.)](https://fathom.video/share/hn5GV8f5TTUaFPxxknx2c7o21Azcmmss?tab=summary&timestamp=1552.0)
  - [Hiring across 7 engineering "lanes" to expand platform capabilities](https://fathom.video/share/hn5GV8f5TTUaFPxxknx2c7o21Azcmmss?tab=summary&timestamp=2426.0)
  - [Doubling down on ML/data science team](https://fathom.video/share/hn5GV8f5TTUaFPxxknx2c7o21Azcmmss?tab=summary&timestamp=2448.0)
  - [Expanding go-to-market team (only 1 AE currently)](https://fathom.video/share/hn5GV8f5TTUaFPxxknx2c7o21Azcmmss?tab=summary&timestamp=2509.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Notable Capital to review data room materials by end of day](https://fathom.video/share/hn5GV8f5TTUaFPxxknx2c7o21Azcmmss?tab=summary&timestamp=2730.0)
  - [Follow up with any additional questions](https://fathom.video/share/hn5GV8f5TTUaFPxxknx2c7o21Azcmmss?tab=summary&timestamp=2730.0)
  - [Determine interest level and potential next steps in process](https://fathom.video/share/hn5GV8f5TTUaFPxxknx2c7o21Azcmmss?tab=summary&timestamp=2730.0)
  - [Explore in-person meeting given office proximity in San Francisco](https://fathom.video/share/hn5GV8f5TTUaFPxxknx2c7o21Azcmmss?tab=summary&timestamp=2745.0)
